notes: Specs confirmed against Creation Networks (AV retailer) spec table and ManualsLib setup manual (Extron part 68-2338-50). The Extron product page was inaccessible (blocked). Two connector caveats: (1) The USB config port is a Mini-USB-B connector — the controlled list has no mini-usb entry; usb-micro was selected as the nearest match. (2) The DC power input is a 2-pole captive screw / euroblock connector on the rear panel (not a barrel jack); euroblock was used as there is no captive-screw power option in the list. The composite video input uses BNC (not RCA). The HDMI input also carries embedded digital audio; a separate 3.5mm TRS analog audio input (Audio In 3) is provided for that input channel as an analog alternative. This product has been discontinued by Extron.

ports.name: RGB/YUV In
ports.note: Female 15-pin HD (HD-15); accepts RGBHV, RGBS, RGsB, YUV/component video

ports.name: HDMI In
ports.note: Female HDMI Type A; accepts HDMI or DVI (with adapter); HDCP-compliant

ports.name: Audio In 1
ports.note: 3.5mm stereo TRS; unbalanced analog audio for Composite input

ports.name: Audio In 2
ports.note: 3.5mm stereo TRS; unbalanced analog audio for RGB/YUV input

ports.name: Audio In 3
ports.note: 3.5mm stereo TRS; unbalanced analog audio for HDMI input (analog passthrough); HDMI input also carries embedded digital audio

ports.name: HDMI Out
ports.note: Female HDMI Type A; scaled video with embedded audio output

ports.name: RS-232
ports.note: Rear panel 3-pole captive screw (euroblock); Tx, Rx, G pins; serial control

ports.name: USB Config
ports.note: Front panel female Mini-USB-B connector (not micro-USB); closest match in controlled list is usb-micro. Used for Extron Configurator software connection and firmware upgrade.

ports.name: DC Power
ports.note: Rear panel 2-pole captive screw (euroblock); 12 VDC, 1.5 A external power supply.
